mapper.sql: id, invite_code_id, invite_code, tenant_id, tenant_name, user_id, user_name, user_ip, user_agent, device_type, device_id, usage_time, usage_result, error_message, extra_data, creator, create_time, updater, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT log.*, ic.tenant_id as tenantId, ic.tenant_name as tenantName FROM im_invite_code_usage_log log LEFT JOIN im_invite_code ic ON log.invite_code_id = ic.id WHERE log.invite_code_id = #{inviteCodeId} AND log.deleted = 0 ORDER BY log.usage_time DESC

SELECT log.*, ic.tenant_id as tenantId, ic.tenant_name as tenantName FROM im_invite_code_usage_log log LEFT JOIN im_invite_code ic ON log.invite_code_id = ic.id WHERE log.invite_code = #{inviteCode} AND log.deleted = 0 ORDER BY log.usage_time DESC

SELECT log.*, ic.tenant_id as tenantId, ic.tenant_name as tenantName FROM im_invite_code_usage_log log LEFT JOIN im_invite_code ic ON log.invite_code_id = ic.id WHERE log.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND log.deleted = 0 ORDER BY log.usage_time DESC
